Guidance and quotes in Panama

Adult diapers: types, sizing and estimated use

Compare tab-style and pull-up diapers, learn how to approach sizing and calculate an approximate quantity for a care period.

Request a quoteI need help choosing
  • Personal guidance
  • Confirmed quotation
  • Support in Panama

Two common formats

Tabs or pull-ups: the main difference is how they are put on

AspectTab-stylePull-up
How it is wornOpens fully and fastens at the sides, which can support changes while lying down.Pulls on like underwear and usually requires more mobility or assistance with standing.
AdjustmentCan be opened and repositioned during fitting.Provides a continuous underwear-style waistband.
Common situationsBed care, limited mobility or fully assisted changes.People who walk or actively participate in changing.
ChoiceDepends on the routine, available assistance and body fit.Depends on mobility, preference and the ability to pull the garment up and down.

These references are general. The final choice depends on the person, fit and available presentation.

A practical starting point

Mobility helps narrow the format

01

Walks independently

Pull-ups may be practical when the person can raise and lower them.

02

Walks with support

Consider who assists and the position used during changes.

03

Sits for much of the day

Fit at the waist, legs and seated position becomes especially important.

04

Remains in bed

Tabs often support side-to-side changes, but the routine should be reviewed.

Sizing guide

Measure before comparing each brand chart

Use a flexible tape to measure the waist and widest part of the hips. Keep both measurements and compare them with the chart for the exact product being quoted.

  1. 1Measure without pulling the tape too tight.
  2. 2Record waist and hip measurements in centimetres.
  3. 3Use the larger measurement when the product chart instructs you to do so.
  4. 4Confirm the exact chart: a Medium is not identical across brands.
Do not choose only by body weight or by a size used in another brand.

Usage estimate

Estimate how many units you may need

Enter average daily use, number of patients and days to cover. Results are estimates and may vary with the care routine.

Weekly usage28
Fortnightly usage60
30-day usage120
Selected period usage120

Informational estimate. Actual usage may vary.

Request a quote with this estimate

Complete the routine

Supplies often quoted with adult diapers

01

Bed protectors

For mattresses, chairs or surfaces used during care.

02

Gloves

To support hygiene and changing tasks.

03

Wet wipes

For practical cleaning when suitable for the care routine.

04

Hygiene and protection

Other supplies are confirmed according to need and availability.

Delivery and availability

Mimo Senior serves customers in Panama. Area, delivery arrangements, formats and availability are confirmed through WhatsApp before an order is completed.

Prepare your quotation request

Step 1 of 3

  1. Basic details
  2. Need
  3. Frequency and summary
Basic details

Facility details

Need

Measure waist and hips in centimetres and keep both values. The exact chart will be checked against the available product.
Additional products
Frequency and summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  

    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
How many diapers does one person use per day?
There is no universal number. Start with the actual average over several days and use the calculator. The routine, product type and individual needs may change usage.
How can I tell whether the size fits?
The product should fit without excessive pressure or large gaps and should follow the product chart. Deep marks, slipping or openings around the legs are reasons to review the size or fit.
Are sizes the same across brands?
No. Ranges differ by brand and model. Always compare measurements with the chart for the available product.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
